# DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE - It is automatically generated
# See the `tools` folder in the mod's root directory

REPLACE:iberia_union_name = {
	type = country
	text = {
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
			}
		}
		localization_key = iberia_union_type_real_union
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_presidential_republic
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_parliamentary_republic
				AND = {
					has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_council_republic
					NOT = { has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_anarchy }
				}
			}
		}
		localization_key = iberia_union_type_federation
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_corporate_state
		}
		localization_key = iberia_union_type_union
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_theocracy
		}
		localization_key = iberia_union_type_concordat
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_anarchy
		}
		localization_key = iberia_union_type_confederation
	}
}

REPLACE:iberia_union_desc = {
	type = country
	text = {
		trigger = {
			RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
		}
		localization_key = iberia_union_desc_monarchy
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_theocracy
		}
		localization_key = iberia_union_desc_theocracy
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_presidential_republic
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_parliamentary_republic
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_corporate_state
			}
		}
		localization_key = iberia_union_desc_republic
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_council_republic
			NOT = { has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_anarchy }
		}
		localization_key = iberia_union_desc_communist
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_anarchy
		}
		localization_key = iberia_union_desc_anarchy
	}
}

REPLACE:iberia_name_to_be = {
	type = country
	text = {
		trigger = {
			je:je_iberia = {
				has_variable = esperanto_var
				var:esperanto_var = 2
				has_variable = esperantia_var
			}
			has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_council_republic
		}
		localization_key = dyn_c_esperantia
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_theocracy
		}
		localization_key = dyn_c_iberian_concordat_def
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_council_republic
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_anarchy
		}
		localization_key = dyn_c_iberian_confederation_def
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_presidential_republic
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_parliamentary_republic
				AND = {
					has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_council_republic
					NOT = {
						has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_anarchy
					}
				}
			}
		}
		localization_key = dyn_c_iberian_federation_def
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_corporate_state
			}
		}
		localization_key = dyn_c_iberian_union_def
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_anarchy
		}
		localization_key = IBE
	}
}

REPLACE:iberian_union_political_text = {
	type = country
	text = {
		trigger = {
			capital = {
				is_in_geographic_region = geographic_region_iberia
			}
			RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
		}
		localization_key = iberia_union_political_text_monarchy
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			capital = {
				is_in_geographic_region = geographic_region_iberia
			}
			has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_theocracy
		}
		localization_key = iberia_union_political_text_theocracy
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			capital = {
				is_in_geographic_region = geographic_region_iberia
			}
			OR = {
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_presidential_republic
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_parliamentary_republic
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_corporate_state
			}
		}
		localization_key = iberia_union_political_text_republic
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			capital = {
				is_in_geographic_region = geographic_region_iberia
			}
			has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_council_republic
		}
		localization_key = iberia_union_political_communist
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			capital = {
				NOT = { is_in_geographic_region = geographic_region_iberia }
			}
		}
		localization_key = blank_tt
	}
}
